Creator Rewards Program Jump to a section What is the Creator Rewards Program? • How does the Creator Rewards Program work? • Who is eligible to join the Creator Rewards Program? • What are the account and video requirements? • What is considered original content? • What are qualified views? • How are rewards calculated? • How to join the Creator Rewards Program • How does the account and video review process work? • How to submit an appeal if your account or video isn't eligible What is the Creator Rewards Program? The Creator Rewards Program is a rewards program designed to help creators foster their creativity and generate higher revenue potential by posting high-quality, original content. Learn more about the Creator Rewards Program in our Creator Academy. How does the Creator Rewards Program work? The Creator Rewards Program rewards eligible creators based on the performance of videos that meet the program requirements. Rewards are calculated based on qualified views and rewards per 1,000 qualified views (also known as RPM). Creators accumulate more rewards as long as they're a part of the program and their videos keep performing well. Learn more about how Standard Reward and Additional Reward are calculated. Who is eligible to join the Creator Rewards Program? Creators must meet the following criteria to join and collect rewards under the Creator Rewards Program: • Be based in one of the countries where the Creator Rewards Program is available. • Have a TikTok account in good standing, including no history of repeatedly or irresponsibly violating our Community Guidelines and Terms of Service policies and engaging in malicious or fraudulent activities. • Have a Personal Account. Business Accounts and accounts belonging to political or government organizations aren't eligible. • Have authentic account information, such as your real name and date of birth. • Be at least 18 years old (or 19 in South Korea). • Have at least 10,000 followers. • Have at least 100,000 video views in the last 30 days. • Post original content that's eligible for rewards. • Post videos that are at least one minute long. Creators must also meet the following requirements under the Creator Rewards Program after they're accepted: • No engagement in malicious or fraudulent activities, such as acquiring fake video views or inflating follower counts. • Posts original and authentic content that speaks to our mission of inspiring joy and creativity. • Must not tamper or attempt to tamper with the program, the reward system, or the recommendation system. • Must not create malicious software or modify code to artificially register, post, or increase likes, follows, views, comments, shares, and more. • Must not make false statements or abusive content or engage in any abusive behavior, illegal, or criminal activities (including fraud) in connection with the program. If your account is found to be in violation of any of the above, you'll receive a notification and your account will be permanently or temporarily removed from the Creator Rewards Program, depending on the severity of the violation. What are the account and video requirements? To collect rewards under the Creator Rewards Program, your account information and posted content must meet the following requirements: • Post original and high-quality content that is filmed, designed, and produced entirely by yourself. • Be at least one minute long. • Be uploaded after joining the Creator Rewards Program. • Have at least 1,000 qualified For You feed views. ༚ Video views from the same account will be calculated only once for one video. ༚ Video views must be longer than 5 seconds. ༚ Video views from people who submitted feedback that they're not interested aren't counted. • Adhere to our Community Guidelines, Terms of Service, and Copyright Policy. In addition, your account information and posted content must not contain: • Fraudulent or underage account information, such as a fake name or date of birth. • Account details or content that was copied from others. • Inappropriate, vulgar, or disturbing behavior, such as explicit sexual behavior, suggestive audio, or scenes that could harm viewers. • Suspicious or unusual account activity. • Advertisements, paid promotions, sponsored content, or videos linked to a Series. • Disinformation or misleading information. • Creator code of conduct, Community Guidelines, or other policy violations. We'll notify you if your account or video violates our guidelines. Keep in mind that we periodically review accounts that are part of the Creator Rewards Program to make sure profile information, including posted content, complies with our policies and requirements. If your account or content is removed and you believe it's a mistake, you can submit an appeal. What is considered original content? Original content under the Creator Rewards Program is quality content that's designed, filmed, and produced by you that showcases your expertise, talent, or creativity and also follows our Terms of Service and Community Guidelines. Content not considered original under the program includes, but is not limited to: • Duet or Stitch videos. • Content copied completely from others and with others' watermarks. • Content reproduced from others with only slight modifications, including videos that are sped up or contain filters, fixed texts, or stickers. • Content that contains different videos or pictures originating from other people, creators, or sources without new and personal ideas. • Content that contains looping videos, single or multiple photos, or only text overlays. • Content that contains lip syncs or copyrighted music that plays for over one minute. Videos under the program that contain copyrighted music for over one minute are at risk of being muted. What are qualified views? Qualified views are unique video views from the For You feed and exclude views with fraud, paid views, disliked views, views with less than 5 seconds watched, promoted views, and artificial views. Videos must reach 1,000 For You feed views to start generating earnings. How are rewards calculated? Eligible videos will start to collect rewards as soon as they reach 1,000 qualified For You feed views. Standard Reward is calculated based on qualified views and rewards per 1,000 qualified views (also known as RPM), while Additional Reward is calculated based on how well-crafted, engaging, and specialized content is. Learn more about how rewards are calculated under the Creator Rewards Program. How to join the Creator Rewards Program Creators who are at least 18 years old (or 19 in South Korea), have an account registered in an eligible region, and who meet the eligibility requirements can apply to the Creator Rewards Program through the TikTok app. To apply to the Creator Rewards Program: 1. Tap Profile at the bottom. 2. Tap the Menu ☰ button at the top, then select TikTok Studio. 3. Tap Creator Rewards Program. You'll receive a reply within approximately 3 days of submitting your application. A few things to know about joining the Creator Rewards Program: • Age eligibility is based on the birthdate you entered when creating your TikTok account and/or confirmed during the Creator Rewards Program application process. • If you're not accepted to the Creator Rewards Program and you believe you're eligible to join, you may appeal within 30 days or you can re-apply 30 days after the appeal period. Your account must be in good standing and in accordance with our Community Guidelines and Terms of Service. How does the account and video review process work? We'll review your account information, including content posted under the Creator Rewards Program, to determine if you're eligible to collect rewards or continue participating in the program. All flags and disqualifications are eligible to be appealed within 30 days of receiving notice. Keep in mind that video appeals don't impact your account. If your account or video passes review: • You'll be eligible to collect rewards. • Your account or video could still be removed for violating Community Guidelines if it's reported or flagged in the future. Rewards already collected on removed videos will be deducted from your balance. If your account or video doesn't pass review: • It may violate Community Guidelines due to, for example, unoriginal or low-quality content, dangerous activities, spam, or deceptive behavior. • You won't be eligible to collect rewards and we'll notify you of the reason. • We'll remove your account or video if it doesn't follow our Community Guidelines or other policy requirements. • Any rewards previously accumulated from the video will be deducted from your balance. • You'll be given the opportunity to appeal the removal directly from the Creator Rewards Program dashboard. Appeals need to be submitted within 30 days of receiving notice. How to submit an appeal if your account or video isn't eligible If you think your account or video was wrongly removed under the Creator Rewards Program, you can submit an appeal. The appeal review takes approximately 3 days. We'll notify you once we have an update. To submit an appeal: 1. In the TikTok app, tap Profile at the bottom. 2. Tap the Menu ☰ button at the top, then select TikTok Studio. 3. Tap Creator Rewards Program. 4. From here: ༚ If your account was disqualified, tap Appeal at the bottom to follow the steps to appeal. ༚ If your video was disqualified, tap the ineligible video and tap Appeal at the bottom to follow the steps to appeal. Keep in mind that you can also appeal through the notification we send to your inbox. Was this helpful? Yes No

Rewards Program","content":"\u003cp\u003eIf you're passionate about crafting high-quality, long-form TikTok videos and turning your creativity into rewards, we've got something special just for you: the \u003cstrong\u003eCreator Rewards Program\u003c/strong\u003e!\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eWe're giving you the chance to \u003cstrong\u003ecollect\u003c/strong\u003e \u003cstrong\u003erewards just for sharing your original video content over 1 minute long. \u003c/strong\u003eBut that's not all! Joining the program also gives you access to an \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/Creator-Rewards-Program-New-RPM-Dashboard\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eenhanced dashboard\u003c/a\u003e where you can easily track your rewards and content performance to improve your strategy as you go. And as of Spring 2025, the program now focuses more on incentivizing \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/Creating-high-quality-videos-on-TikTok\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003ehigh-quality content creation\u003c/a\u003e with the launch of an exciting new update called \u003cstrong\u003eAdditional Reward\u003c/strong\u003e, offering you even more opportunities to collect. Learn more about these new extra payouts here.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eWe're hoping these updates empower you to strengthen your content ecosystem, grow your platform, and unlock more real-world opportunities.\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch1 level=\"1\" id=\"joinCRP\" align=\"\"\u003eJoining the Creator Rewards Program\u003c/h1\u003e\u003cp\u003eReady to dive right in? Just make sure you meet these criteria to get started:\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eThe program is currently open to creators in the United States, United Kingdom, Germany, Japan, South Korea, France, Mexico, and Brazil\u003c/strong\u003e, so you must be based in one of these countries and have an account registered there.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eYour TikTok account should be in good standing, meaning you follow our \u003ca href=\"https://www.tiktok.com/community-guidelines/en/?cgversion=2025H2update\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eCommunity Guidelines\u003c/a\u003e and \u003ca href=\"https://www.tiktok.com/legal/page/us/terms-of-service/en\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eTerms of Service\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eOnly \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/TikTok-Business-vs-Personal\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003ePersonal Accounts\u003c/a\u003e are eligible. Business Accounts and accounts associated with political or government organizations do not qualify.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eYou need to be at least 18 years old to participate.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eYour account should have at least 10,000 followers and 100,000 video views in the last 30 days.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eYou must not tamper with the program, engage in fraudulent activities, or violate our \u003ca href=\"https://www.tiktok.com/community-guidelines/en/?cgversion=2025H2update\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eCommunity Guidelines\u003c/a\u003e in any way.\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003eOnce you've checked all these boxes, simply follow these steps to enroll:\u003c/p\u003e\u003col start=\"1\"\u003e\u003cli\u003eGo to your profile and tap the \u003cstrong\u003eMenu\u003c/strong\u003e button (☰).\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eSelect \u003cstrong\u003eTikTok Studio\u003c/strong\u003e and then \u003cstrong\u003eCreator Rewards Program\u003c/strong\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eApply, and \u003cstrong\u003eyou'll hear back within three days\u003c/strong\u003e. That's it!\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ol\u003e\u003ch1 level=\"1\" id=\"createContent\" align=\"\"\u003eCreating reward-worthy content\u003c/h1\u003e\u003cp\u003eFirst things first, to be eligible for rewards, your content must fit these criteria:\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003eIt must be \u003cstrong\u003eoriginal,\u003c/strong\u003e \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/Creating-high-quality-videos-on-TikTok\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003ehigh-quality content\u003c/a\u003e over 1 minute long.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eIt should rack up at least 1,000 views on the For You feed.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eIt can't be a Duet or Stitch.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eIt shouldn't be created using Photo Mode.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eAds, paid promotions, or sponsored content do not qualify.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eIt must follow the program's terms, the \u003ca href=\"https://www.tiktok.com/legal/page/us/terms-of-service/en\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eTerms of Service\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"https://www.tiktok.com/community-guidelines/en/?cgversion=2025H2update\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eCommunity Guidelines\u003c/a\u003e, \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/creator-code-of-conduct\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eCreator Code of Conduct\u003c/a\u003e, and \u003ca href=\"https://www.tiktok.com/legal/page/global/copyright-policy/en\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eCopyright Policy\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003eTo qualify for \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/crp-unlock-additional-reward\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eAdditional Reward\u003c/a\u003e, your video must also fit these criteria:\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eWell-crafted content\u003c/strong\u003e that demonstrates your attention to detail in the creation process.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eEngaging content\u003c/strong\u003e that sparks meaningful conversations and builds community on and off the app.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSpecialized content\u003c/strong\u003e that demonstrates your expertise in a niche and brings your unique perspective to create valuable content for your viewers.\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003eAnd finally, don't forget to\u003cstrong\u003e ensure your videos are\u003c/strong\u003e \u003cstrong\u003e1080p or higher\u003c/strong\u003e!\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch1 level=\"1\" id=\"\" align=\"\"\u003eLeveling up your content game\u003c/h1\u003e\u003cp\u003eThe key to collecting more rewards is posting high-quality content your community loves! Here are a few tools and tips to help you get as much out of the program as possible:\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eSmooth editing: \u003c/strong\u003eUse TikTok's \u003ca href=\"https://www.tiktok.com/creator-center/upload?from=upload\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eweb creation\u003c/a\u003e tool for seamless content editing. It's like having a personal editing studio right at your fingertips!\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eExtended video uploads:\u003c/strong\u003e Upload videos up to a whopping 60 minutes long directly on TikTok.com. Go ahead, tell your story without limits!\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eBoost engagement:\u003c/strong\u003e Add some flair to your videos with text, filters, green screens, and effects. Get creative and watch your audience's engagement soar.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eEasy editing:\u003c/strong\u003e Whether \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/tiktok-studio\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003ein-app\u003c/a\u003e, in \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/unleashing-your-creativity-with-tiktok-studio\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003ethe standalone app\u003c/a\u003e, or on \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/tool-web-creation-intro\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003ethe web\u003c/a\u003e, TikTok Studio makes editing clips, sounds, images, and text a breeze. No fancy software required!\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eFlexibility:\u003c/strong\u003e Upload vertical or landscape videos — whatever fits your style best.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAnalytics:\u003c/strong\u003e Dive into your video analytics, follower metrics, and account performance with TikTok's handy \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/tool-analytics-intro\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eanalytics tool\u003c/a\u003e. Learn what's working and what's not, then adjust accordingly.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eRepurpose content:\u003c/strong\u003e Turn those long videos into bite-sized, 1 minute+ clips with ease on the TikTok website. Talk about maximizing your content's potential.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eUnlimited Sounds Library:\u003c/strong\u003e Explore TikTok's \u003ca href=\"https://www.tiktok.com/tiktokstudio/sound-library\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eUnlimited Sounds Library\u003c/a\u003e for the perfect audio backdrop or get even more creative with your own original sounds.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eEfficiency:\u003c/strong\u003e Save time with bulk uploading on the \u003ca href=\"https://www.tiktok.com/tiktokstudio/upload?from=upload\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eweb\u003c/a\u003e — it's faster than doing each video individually. Plus, you can even schedule your uploads for maximum convenience!\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eCopyright checks:\u003c/strong\u003e Stay on the safe side by \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/tool-web-creation-intro\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003epre-checking\u003c/a\u003e if your video contains any infringing soundtracks before hitting publish.\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003cp\u003eWant to boost your rewards potential even more? Check out \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/RPM-understanding-the-four-key-factors\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eFinding Creator Rewards Program success\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch1 level=\"1\" id=\"\" align=\"\"\u003eFAQs\u003c/h1\u003e\u003ch2 level=\"2\" id=\"what-makes-your-account/content-ineligible\" align=\"\"\u003eWhat makes your account/content ineligible?\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eTikTok strives to be a place where authenticity shines and safety is always a top priority. That's why content ineligible for the For You feed will not be eligible for the Creator Rewards Program, including:\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli style=\"text-align: left;\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eUnoriginal:\u003c/strong\u003e Your account info or video content is copied from others or has minimal original input or edits.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli style=\"text-align: left;\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eLow quality:\u003c/strong\u003e Your account info or video content includes split screens, meaningless reactions, low-quality images, or slide videos.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli style=\"text-align: left;\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eAdvertising:\u003c/strong\u003e Your profile or account info contains personal or business contact information.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli style=\"text-align: left;\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eClickbait: \u003c/strong\u003eYour profile, account info, or content lacks meaningful value and is primarily designed to attract followers, likes, or advertisement clicks.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli style=\"text-align: left;\"\u003e\u003cstrong\u003eInappropriate:\u003c/strong\u003e Your account or content contains inappropriate audio, behavior or visuals, such as sexually suggestive content and excessive body exposure.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli style=\"text-align: If you successfully appeal and your account is recovered, you will automatically be reinstated in the Creator Rewards Program.\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003ch2 level=\"2\" id=\"\" align=\"\"\u003eCan I appeal if my video becomes ineligible? What about if my account is disqualified?\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eAbsolutely! If you get a notification saying your video doesn't meet the eligibility criteria, you can submit an appeal within 80 days.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eIf you're notified that your account has been disqualified from the Creator Rewards Program, you can submit an appeal within 30 days.\u003c/p\u003e\u003cp\u003eTo submit an appeal from your inbox:\u003c/p\u003e\u003col start=\"1\"\u003e\u003cli\u003eIn the TikTok app, tap\u003cstrong\u003e \"Inbox\"\u003c/strong\u003e near the bottom corner.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eTap the notification.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eTap \u003cstrong\u003e\"Submit an appeal,\"\u003c/strong\u003e then follow the instructions provided.\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ol\u003e\u003cp\u003eTo submit an appeal for your removed video:\u003c/p\u003e\u003col start=\"1\"\u003e\u003cli\u003eIn the TikTok app, go to the video that was removed.\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eTap \u003cstrong\u003e\"Community Guidelines violation: See details.\"\u003c/strong\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eTap \u003cstrong\u003e\"Submit an appeal,\"\u003c/strong\u003e then follow the instructions provided.\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ol\u003e\u003ch2 level=\"2\" id=\"\" align=\"\"\u003eHow are my rewards calculated? What factors matter?\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eWith our new update, your total rewards will now equal Standard Reward and Additional Reward combined. Learn more about how both of these are calculated, what factors affect them, and how you can maximize your success in the program \u003ca href=\"\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/RPM-understanding-the-four-key-factors\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003ehere\u003c/a\u003e.\u003c/p\u003e\u003ch2 level=\"2\" id=\"\" align=\"\"\u003eWhat counts as a qualified view? Do different types of views count?\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eQualified views exclude any fraudulent or paid views. Here’s how they’re calculated:\u003c/p\u003e\u003cul\u003e\u003cli style=\"text-align: left;\"\u003eA watch time of at least five seconds\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli style=\"text-align: left;\"\u003eViews with an \"I'm not interested\" tap not included\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli style=\"text-align: left;\"\u003eMultiple views from the same account are counted as one unique view\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003e\u003ca href=\"article/search\" target=\"_blank\" rel=\"nofollow noreferrer\" class=\"syl-link\" data-entry-id=\"article/search\" data-anchor-id=\"\"\u003eSearch\u003c/a\u003e views with watch times of at least 30 seconds\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eMust be from where the Creator Rewards Program is available: the United States, Mexico, Brazil, South Korea, Japan, Germany, the United Kingdom, and France\u003c/li\u003e\u003cli\u003eAds, paid promotions, and sponsored content don't qualify for rewards\u003c/li\u003e\u003c/ul\u003e\u003ch2 level=\"2\" id=\"\" align=\"\"\u003eWill joining the Creator Rewards Program affect my video views, followers, or engagement?\u003c/h2\u003e\u003cp\u003eNope! Your content's performance and your following won't be affected when you join the program.
